headlines.flagship: US CPI YoY (Jun 2026) above 3.0% contributes 69.82% of total absolute gap mass, 3.146x larger than the second-ranked dislocation.
headlines.flagship_persistence: US CPI YoY (Jun 2026) above 3.0% stays the top dislocation in 11/12 deterministic snapshots.
headlines.secondary: Platform gap asymmetry is positive in 12/12 snapshots: Polymarket mean gaps stay above Kalshi.
headlines.third: Inflation dislocation share increased by 30.66 pts across the deterministic window.
